# Conceptual ESM

Main features:

* Two-latitude surface EBM (low/high)
* Deep ocean temperature
* Stommel circulation
* Salinity feedback
* Two-latitude upper-ocean carbon boxes with temperature-dependent air–ocean exchange
* Land carbon with temperature effects on photosynthesis and respiration, plus CO2 fertilization effect
* Atmospheric carbon
* Stefan–Boltzmann radiation, ice-albedo feedback, and lumped fast climate feedbacks (lapse rate, water vapor, clouds)

State Variables

| Variable       | Description                              |
|----------------|------------------------------------------|
| $T_L(t)$       | Low-latitude surface temperature (K)     |
| $T_H(t)$       | High-latitude surface temperature (K)    |
| $T_D(t)$       | Deep ocean temperature (K)               |
| $\Delta S(t)$  | Salinity contrast (psu)                  |
| $Q(t)$         | Thermohaline circulation strength (conceptual units) |
| $C_{atm}(t)$   | Atmospheric carbon (PgC)                 |
| $C_L(t)$       | Low-latitude upper ocean carbon (PgC)    |
| $C_H(t)$       | High-latitude upper ocean carbon (PgC)   |
| $C_{land}(t)$  | Land carbon (PgC)                        |
| $E(t)$         | Anthropogenic emissions (PgC/yr)         |

Surface Energy Balance - Low Latitude:

$$
H_L \frac{dT_L}{dt} =
S_L (1 - \alpha_L) 
- \varepsilon \sigma T_L^4
- D (T_L - T_H)
- \gamma Q (T_L - T_H)
+ \lambda F_{CO2}(C_{atm})
$$

Surface Energy Balance — High Latitude

$$
\alpha_H(T_H) = \alpha_{ice} + \frac{\alpha_{water}-\alpha_{ice}}{2} \left[ 1 + \tanh\left(\frac{T_H - T_c}{\Delta_T}\right) \right]
$$

$$
H_H \frac{dT_H}{dt} =
S_H (1 - \alpha_H(T_H))
- \varepsilon \sigma T_H^4
+ D (T_L - T_H)
+ \gamma Q (T_L - T_H)
- \kappa (T_H - T_D)
+ \lambda F_{CO2}(C_{atm})
$$

Deep Ocean Temperature

$$
H_D \frac{dT_D}{dt} = \kappa (T_H - T_D)
$$

Thermohaline Circulation (Stommel)

$$
\frac{dQ}{dt} = \lambda_Q \left[ \alpha_T (T_L - T_H) - \alpha_S \Delta S - \mu Q \right]
$$

Salinity Contrast

$$
\frac{d\Delta S}{dt} = F_{fw}(T_H) - Q \Delta S
$$

$$
F_{fw}(T_H) = F_0 + \eta (T_H - T_{ref})
$$

Ocean Carbon — Low Latitude Box

$$
\frac{dC_L}{dt} = k_{ao,L}(T_L) \left( C_{atm} - C_L \right) - Q (C_L - C_H)
$$

Ocean Carbon — High Latitude Box

$$
\frac{dC_H}{dt} = k_{ao,H}(T_H) \left( C_{atm} - C_H \right) + Q (C_L - C_H) - k_{oc} (C_H - C_{deep})
$$

Land Carbon

$$
\frac{dC_{land}}{dt} = P(T_L, C_{atm}) - R(T_L) C_{land}
$$

$$
P(T_L, C_{atm}) = P_0 f(T_L) \left( 1 + \phi \ln \frac{C_{atm}}{C_{ref}} \right) \\
R(T_L) = R_0 \exp[ \gamma_R (T_L - T_{ref}) ] \\
f(T_L) = \exp\left[ - \frac{(T_L - T_{opt})^2}{\Delta_T^2} \right]
$$
Atmospheric Carbon

$$
\frac{dC_{atm}}{dt} =
- k_{ao,L}(T_L) (C_{atm} - C_L)
- k_{ao,H}(T_H) (C_{atm} - C_H)
- P(T_L, C_{atm}) + R(T_L) C_{land} + E(t)
$$

Radiative Forcing

$$
F_{CO2}(C_{atm}) = \xi \ln \frac{C_{atm}}{C_{ref}}
$$

Temperature-dependent air-ocean exchange

$$
k_{ao,L}(T_L) = k_{ao,0} [ 1 - \beta (T_L - T_{ref}) ] \\
k_{ao,H}(T_H) = k_{ao,0} [ 1 - \beta (T_H - T_{ref}) ]
$$

Parameter Values

| Parameter      | Meaning                              | Value                                     |
|----------------|--------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| $H_L$          | Surface heat capacity, low lat       | $1.0\times10^8$ J m$^{-2}$ K$^{-1}$     |
| $H_H$          | Surface heat capacity, high lat      | $1.0\times10^8$                          |
| $H_D$          | Deep ocean heat capacity             | $5.0\times10^9$                          |
| $S_L$          | Insolation low lat                   | 340 W m$^{-2}$                            |
| $S_H$          | Insolation high lat                  | 280 W m$^{-2}$                            |
| $\alpha_L$     | Low-lat albedo                        | 0.3                                       |
| $\alpha_{ice}$ | High-lat ice albedo                   | 0.6                                       |
| $\alpha_{water}$ | High-lat water albedo               | 0.3                                       |
| $T_c$          | Ice transition temp                   | 263 K                                     |
| $\Delta_T$     | Albedo transition width               | 5 K                                       |
| $\varepsilon$  | Emissivity                            | 1.0                                       |
| $\sigma$       | Stefan-Boltzmann                      | $5.67\times10^{-8}$ W m$^{-2}$ K$^{-4}$  |
| $D$            | Atmospheric heat transport           | 1.0 W m$^{-2}$ K$^{-1}$                   |
| $\gamma$       | Ocean heat transport                  | 0.5 W m$^{-2}$ K$^{-1}$                   |
| $\kappa$       | Deep ocean coupling                   | 0.1 W m$^{-2}$ K$^{-1}$                   |
| $\lambda$      | Climate sensitivity factor            | 0.8 (W m$^{-2}$)$^{-1}$                   |
| $\xi$          | CO$_2$ forcing coefficient            | 5.35 W m$^{-2}$                           |
| $\alpha_T$     | Thermal contribution to $Q$           | 0.1                                       |
| $\alpha_S$     | Salinity contribution to $Q$          | 0.08                                      |
| $\mu$          | Circulation damping                   | 0.2                                       |
| $\lambda_Q$    | Circulation timescale                 | 0.5 yr$^{-1}$                             |
| $F_0$          | Baseline freshwater                   | 0 psu/yr                                  |
| $\eta$         | Freshwater temp sensitivity           | 0.01 psu/K                                |
| $T_{ref}$      | Reference temperature                 | 288 K                                     |
| $k_{ao,0}$     | Base air-ocean carbon exchange        | 0.3 yr$^{-1}$                             |
| $\beta$        | Temp dependence exchange              | 0.005 K$^{-1}$                            |
| $k_{oc}$       | Ocean to deep ocean exchange          | 0.05 yr$^{-1}$                            |
| $P_0$          | Base photosynthesis                   | 90 PgC/yr                                 |
| $T_{opt}$      | Optimum photosynthesis temp           | 293 K                                     |
| $\phi$         | CO$_2$ fertilization                  | 0.2                                       |
| $R_0$          | Base respiration                      | 0.02 yr$^{-1}$                            |
| $\gamma_R$     | Respiration temp sensitivity          | 0.08 K$^{-1}$                             |
| $C_{ref}$      | Reference carbon                      | 280 PgC                                   |
